metadata.title: Emoji Shortcodes
metadata.description: This Plugin enables the use of Markdown Emoji Shortcodes :smile:

regex.source: .setDesc('If this is turned on, Emoji shortcodes will be immediately replaced after typing. Otherwise they are still stored as a shortcode and you only see the Emoji in Preview Mode.')
regex.target: .setDesc('如果此项打开，Emoji shortcodes 将会被输入后立即替换。否则仅以短码存储，您只有在预览模式才能看到 Emoji')

regex.source: .setDesc('If this is turned on, a Suggester will appear everytime you type : followed by a letter. This will help you insert Emojis. (Doesn\'t work on mobile)')
regex.target: .setDesc('如果此项打开，当您每次输入紧跟 : 的字母时将获得建议。这会对插入 Emoji 大有裨益。（此项在移动端不起效）')

regex.source: .setDesc('Suggester gives priority to recently used emoji.')
.setDesc('If you like this Plugin, consider donating to support continued development:')
regex.target: .setDesc('如果您喜欢此插件，希望您考虑捐献以支持继续开发：')
.createEl('h2', { text: 'Emoji Shortcodes Plugin 表情短码输入插件' })
